overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic Asian-inspired urban district. The character moves from a covered pedestrian walkway past traditional storefronts with red lanterns, under massive elevated highways, past holographic advertisements, and toward a metro station entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with traditional Japanese architecture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the green pedestrian path under the elevated highway, passing traditional storefronts

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with support pillars
green painted pedestrian path with yellow tactile paving strips
multi-story building with teal facade, traditional Japanese architectural elements and red paper lanterns
traditional red Japanese lanterns hanging outside the building entrance
traditional stone garden lanterns along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a green pedestrian pathway sheltered under a massive elevated highway. Traditional Japanese architecture with red paper lanterns and stone lanterns lines the left side, contrasting with the brutalist concrete overpass structure overhead. The lighting is a mix of natural morning sun and shadow from the highway above.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large digital advertisements and neon storefronts

events.description: passes close by the large vertical digital billboard temporarily filling the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past neon-lit storefronts and a large digital advertisement

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction along the path

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying grotesque face with 'OUTSPOKEN TASTE' text in neon colors
storefront with purple neon lighting and Japanese signage
tall palm trees visible along the street beyond the railing

segments.scene_description: The character moves past a large digital billboard advertising 'OUTSPOKEN TASTE' with a grotesque face image, transitioning from the traditional architecture to more commercial storefronts with neon lighting. The elevated highway structure shifts to the right side as the path opens slightly to reveal palm trees and the street beyond the railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection under highway overpass with holographic advertising pillars

events.description: crosses the street moving from the green pedestrian path to the underpass sidewalk
moves from sunlit intersection into the darker shadow of the highway underpass

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and moving toward the metro station entrance under the highway

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving along the multi-lane road under the overpass
group of pedestrians crossing the street in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall concrete pillar with large holographic advertisement showing a woman's face with cat ears
orange metal barriers lining the edge of the pedestrian crossing area
multi-lane asphalt road with yellow and red painted markings under the highway

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the asphalt street under the massive highway overpass, passing orange traffic barriers and a large holographic advertising pillar. The environment transitions from the sheltered walkway to an open intersection with moving traffic, then back into the shadow of the underpass as the character approaches the metro station entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass corridor leading to NCART metro station entrance with stairs

events.description: approaches the NCART metro station entrance with large '11' signage and concrete stairs
enters the darker station area where artificial fluorescent lighting dominates over natural light

agents.ego_description: walking through the underpass corridor toward the station stairs, passing other pedestrians and a security guard

notable_agents.action: security guard or station attendant standing against the wall near the entrance

entered.detail: metro station entrance with large white and red '11' signage overhead and concrete canopy
massive cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the highway structure overhead
glowing green holographic display showing a map labeled 'TOURIST INFO' at the base of the stairs
wide concrete staircase leading up into the station with metal handrails

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow enclosed underpass with concrete walls and support pillars, approaching the NCART metro station entrance marked with large '11' signage. The lighting shifts to artificial fluorescent lights as the character nears a glowing green holographic tourist map at the base of the concrete stairs leading into the station.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic urban district that transitions from a blend of traditional architecture to a stark, industrial transit hub. It begins along a green pedestrian pathway sheltered by a massive concrete highway, where red paper lanterns and stone ornaments contrast with the brutalist overpass above. As the character moves forward, the traditional scenery gives way to commercial storefronts and a grotesque digital billboard, while the path opens up to reveal palm trees and the street beyond the railing. The scene then shifts as the camera crosses an open asphalt intersection filled with orange traffic barriers and holographic pillars before receding back into the deep shadows of the underpass. Finally, the environment narrows into a concrete corridor lit by artificial fluorescent lights, leading directly toward the NCART metro station entrance and a glowing green holographic map.
